channel.title: 中国日报-国际
channel.description: 中国日报-国际 RSS Feed

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: WWII memorials solemn reminders of war tragedy
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Memorial days were set up by governments of the warâs major belligerents to remember those who died or sacrificed themselves, and to remind people of tragedies caused by war. Here are ways different countries keep the memory of the wartime history alive.

item.title: WWII memorials solemn reminders of war tragedy
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Memorial days were set up by governments of the warâs major belligerents to remember those who died or sacrificed themselves, and to remind people of tragedies caused by war. Here are ways different countries keep the memory of the wartime history alive.

item.title: Chinese, Russian and Indian ministers meet
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China, Russia and India agreed to maintain regional security and economic architecture in the Asia-Pacific, according to a joint statement issued on Monday after the 15th trilateral meeting of the foreign ministers of the three countries.

item.title: Chinese, Russian and Indian ministers meet
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China, Russia and India agreed to maintain regional security and economic architecture in the Asia-Pacific, according to a joint statement issued on Monday after the 15th trilateral meeting of the foreign ministers of the three countries.

item.title: Chinese, Russian and Indian ministers meet
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China, Russia and India agreed to maintain regional security and economic architecture in the Asia-Pacific, according to a joint statement issued on Monday after the 15th trilateral meeting of the foreign ministers of the three countries.

item.title: Nanjing massacre remembered on 80th anniversary
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed by the Japanese military during World War II brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.title: Nanjing massacre remembered on 80th anniversary
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed by the Japanese military during World War II brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.title: Young Chinese-Irish ballroom dancer goes international
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Kerry Sui, a 10-year-old Chinese-Irish dancer, and her dance partner Francis Carty are set to compete in Italy and perform on Chinese TV after winning the British juvenile ballroom championship.

item.title: Would-be suicide bomber sets off explosion in NYC
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A would-be suicide bomber set off part of a homemade explosive device in a subway passage between Times Square and the Port Authority Bus Terminal in Midtown Manhattan during Monday's morning rush hour, seriously wounding himself and injuring four others, police said.

item.title: UK and China allow more direct flights
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The United Kingdom and China have agreed to raise the limit on the number of direct weekly flights between the two nations to 150 from 100. The UK government said the move was the first of several "open skies" deals struck in an effort to increase trade post-Brexit.

item.title: Four injured in Manhattan terror-related explosion
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Police said four people were injured as a device attached to a suspected bomber exploded prematurely at the New York Port Authority bus terminal in Midtown Manhattan during Mondayâs morning rush hour.

item.title: Bad weather causes massive travel disruption in Britain
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Severe frost, rains and icy roads after heavy snowfall have caused major travel disruption across large parts of Britain on Monday.

item.title: Four injured in New York City blast, suspect nabbed
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Several people were hurt in an explosion in the New York City subway near the Times Square area of Manhattan in early Monday morning.

item.title: Universities champion new ideas
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Tsinghua University and Imperial College London have launched a joint fund to support bold scientific ideas in their early stages.

item.title: Welsh national side helping with Chinese soccer goals
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Fans of the Welsh national soccer team have experienced some dizzying highs and disappointing lows in the last 18 months.

item.title: South San Francisco elects first Chinese-American mayor
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Liza Lau Normandy has been elected mayor of South San Francisco, the first Chinese-American to be elected in the city's 110 years history, according to World Journal.

item.title: South San Francisco elects first Chinese-American mayor
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Liza Lau Normandy has been elected mayor of South San Francisco, the first Chinese-American to be elected in the city's 110 years history, according to World Journal.

item.title: DaDong duck ready for New York opening
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: To acclaimed chef Dong Zhenxiang, it's all about the texture of the duck.

item.title: DaDong duck ready for New York opening
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: To acclaimed chef Dong Zhenxiang, it's all about the texture of the duck.

item.title: DaDong duck ready for New York opening
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: To acclaimed chef Dong Zhenxiang, it's all about the texture of the duck.

item.title: Algerian boy, 12, wins Shenzhen talent contest
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A 12-year-old Algerian boy was crowned winner of the eighth Shenzhen Expats Chinese Talent Competition on Sunday.

item.title: Britain, EU could strike trade deal within a year, says Brexit chief
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Brexit Secretary David Davis said Sunday the odds of Britain exiting the European Union without a deal had dropped dramatically following an agreement both sides reached in Brussels on Friday.

item.title: Britain, EU could strike trade deal within a year, says Brexit chief
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Brexit Secretary David Davis said Sunday the odds of Britain exiting the European Union without a deal had dropped dramatically following an agreement both sides reached in Brussels on Friday.

item.title: Britain, EU could strike trade deal within a year, says Brexit chief
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Brexit Secretary David Davis said Sunday the odds of Britain exiting the European Union without a deal had dropped dramatically following an agreement both sides reached in Brussels on Friday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed by the Japanese military during World War II brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed by the Japanese military during World War II brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed by the Japanese military during World War II brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

item.title: Anti-nuclear weapon campaigner ICAN receives 2017 Nobel Peace Prize
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons (ICAN) received the 2017 Nobel Peace Prize at an awarding ceremony here Sunday, for its efforts to give new momentum to the process of abolishing nuclear weapons.

item.title: Anti-nuclear weapon campaigner ICAN receives 2017 Nobel Peace Prize
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons (ICAN) received the 2017 Nobel Peace Prize at an awarding ceremony here Sunday, for its efforts to give new momentum to the process of abolishing nuclear weapons.

item.title: Anti-nuclear weapon campaigner ICAN receives 2017 Nobel Peace Prize
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons (ICAN) received the 2017 Nobel Peace Prize at an awarding ceremony here Sunday, for its efforts to give new momentum to the process of abolishing nuclear weapons.

item.title: Anti-nuclear weapon campaigner ICAN receives 2017 Nobel Peace Prize
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons (ICAN) received the 2017 Nobel Peace Prize at an awarding ceremony here Sunday, for its efforts to give new momentum to the process of abolishing nuclear weapons.

item.title: California leader says fires are 'new normal'
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: California's Governor Jerry Brown said that climate change has pushed weather to the most extreme, and the US western state must better prepare for a constant threat of wildfire which is a "new normal".

item.title: California leader says fires are 'new normal'
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: California's Governor Jerry Brown said that climate change has pushed weather to the most extreme, and the US western state must better prepare for a constant threat of wildfire which is a "new normal".

item.title: California leader says fires are 'new normal'
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: California's Governor Jerry Brown said that climate change has pushed weather to the most extreme, and the US western state must better prepare for a constant threat of wildfire which is a "new normal".

item.title: California leader says fires are 'new normal'
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: California's Governor Jerry Brown said that climate change has pushed weather to the most extreme, and the US western state must better prepare for a constant threat of wildfire which is a "new normal".

item.title: France's Macron to host global climate meet
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: About fifty global leaders are expected to attend the One Planet Summit on Tuesday in Paris hosted by French President Emmanuel Macron to decide what steps to take after the US government left the Paris Climate Change Agreement.

item.title: France's Macron to host global climate meet
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: About fifty global leaders are expected to attend the One Planet Summit on Tuesday in Paris hosted by French President Emmanuel Macron to decide what steps to take after the US government left the Paris Climate Change Agreement.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: About fifty global leaders are expected to attend the One Planet Summit on Tuesday in Paris hosted by French President Emmanuel Macron to decide what steps to take after the US government left the Paris Climate Change Agreement.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in southwestern Sichuan province.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in southwestern Sichuan province.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in southwestern Sichuan province.

item.title: UN political chief visits Pyongyang
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The UN's political chief on Saturday stressed the urgency of reducing tensions on the Korean Peninsula after finishing his four-day visit to the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.

item.title: UN political chief visits Pyongyang
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The UN's political chief on Saturday stressed the urgency of reducing tensions on the Korean Peninsula after finishing his four-day visit to the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.

item.title: UN political chief visits Pyongyang
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The UN's political chief on Saturday stressed the urgency of reducing tensions on the Korean Peninsula after finishing his four-day visit to the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.

item.title: Ministers condemn US Jerusalem move
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Arab foreign ministers on Sunday demanded that the United States rescind President Donald Trump's decision to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital.

item.title: Ministers condemn US Jerusalem move
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Arab foreign ministers on Sunday demanded that the United States rescind President Donald Trump's decision to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital.

item.title: Ministers condemn US Jerusalem move
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Arab foreign ministers on Sunday demanded that the United States rescind President Donald Trump's decision to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Arab foreign ministers on Sunday demanded that the United States rescind President Donald Trump's decision to recognize Jerusalem as Israel's capital.

item.title: Foreign minister: Diplomacy will focus on shared future
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China's endeavor to foster a new form of international relations and build a community with a shared future for mankind will be the overarching goals of China's foreign policy in the years ahead, Foreign Minister Wang Yi said.

item.title: Foreign minister: Diplomacy will focus on shared future
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China's endeavor to foster a new form of international relations and build a community with a shared future for mankind will be the overarching goals of China's foreign policy in the years ahead, Foreign Minister Wang Yi said.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China's endeavor to foster a new form of international relations and build a community with a shared future for mankind will be the overarching goals of China's foreign policy in the years ahead, Foreign Minister Wang Yi said.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Here, we present some of the most striking images from around the world this past week.

item.title: China ceases to be dumping ground for foreign waste
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: A National Public Radio story on Saturday described the impact on Portland, Oregon, after Chinaâs recent ban on the import of foreign waste.

item.title: US tax overhaul's lure could be deceptive
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Chinese scholars said market expectations should remain objective on Washington's approval of a tax overhaul and they expect its benefits targeting special groups in the United States will be limited.

item.title: US tax overhaul's lure could be deceptive
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Chinese scholars said market expectations should remain objective on Washington's approval of a tax overhaul and they expect its benefits targeting special groups in the United States will be limited.

item.title: US tax overhaul's lure could be deceptive
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Chinese scholars said market expectations should remain objective on Washington's approval of a tax overhaul and they expect its benefits targeting special groups in the United States will be limited.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Chinese scholars said market expectations should remain objective on Washington's approval of a tax overhaul and they expect its benefits targeting special groups in the United States will be limited.

item.title: Malaysians choose 'Road' as Chinese character of the year
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The Malaysian people have chosen "Lu," or "Road" in English, as the Chinese character of the year in 2017, taking cue from the country's active plan in infrastructure expansion.

item.title: Malaysians choose 'Road' as Chinese character of the year
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The Malaysian people have chosen "Lu," or "Road" in English, as the Chinese character of the year in 2017, taking cue from the country's active plan in infrastructure expansion.

item.title: Ferry runs aground in Calais, no injuries reported -media
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Ferry runs aground in Calais, no injuries reported -media

item.title: Israel says it demolishes tunnel from Gaza into Israel
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Israel says it demolishes tunnel from Gaza into Israel

item.title: Israel says it demolishes tunnel from Gaza into Israel
item.author: 中国日报-国际

item.title: Israel says it demolishes tunnel from Gaza into Israel
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Israel says it demolishes tunnel from Gaza into Israel

item.title: Air China launches first non-stop flight to Brisbane
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first non-stop flight connecting China with Brisbane, the habitat of the Great Barrier Reef in Australia, will depart from Beijing on Monday early morning, benefiting tourists from both countries. Air Chinaâs CA 795 will leave Beijing at 2:30 am and arrive about 11 hours later in Brisbane, Queensland, at 15:10 local time. Chinaâs flagship carrier will operate four services every week on Monday, Wednesday, Friday and Sunday. Brisbane will become Air Chinaâs third destination in Australia, after Sydney and Melbourne. Previously it used to take 12 hours and 30 minutes from Beijing to Queensland with one-transfer. âThe establishment of this new route is part of Air Chinaâs global expansion of its route network and improvement of links between China and Australia,â said Hou Xulun, deputy head of Air China. âThe launch of the non-stop route between Beijing and Brisbane will provide a convenient transport link that will enhance bilateral trade, business cooperation and tourism,â he added. The carrier now handles over 40 weekly passenger flights between China and Australia. The fast growth in direct flight between China and Australia has been underpinned by the landmark Australia-China open air services agreement, signed a year ago, said Jan Adams, Australian ambassador to China. Brisbane in Queensland is a major tourism destination, with the Gold Coast and the Great Barrier Reef the favorite spots. The number of Chinese tourists visiting Australia has witnessed double-digit growth, said Air Chinaâs Hou. In 2016, two-way tourist flow between China and Australia recorded 2 million trips.

item.title: 'Right steps' point to a healthier China
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China's emphasis on innovation in recent years has led to more opportunities for global clinical development and research programs to be conducted in the country, something that has benefited its people, says a leading executive at a top German pharmaceutical company.

item.title: 'Right steps' point to a healthier China
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: China's emphasis on innovation in recent years has led to more opportunities for global clinical development and research programs to be conducted in the country, something that has benefited its people, says a leading executive at a top German pharmaceutical company.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: This was New Yorkâs first snow this winter.

item.title: Joint military medical exercise of Angola, Serbia and US starts in N. Angola
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first joint military medical exercise of the armed forces of Angola, Serbia and the United States began Saturday in the town of Vale do Paraiso, Angola's northern Bengo province.

item.title: Joint military medical exercise of Angola, Serbia and US starts in N. Angola
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first joint military medical exercise of the armed forces of Angola, Serbia and the United States began Saturday in the town of Vale do Paraiso, Angola's northern Bengo province.

item.title: Joint military medical exercise of Angola, Serbia and US starts in N. Angola
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first joint military medical exercise of the armed forces of Angola, Serbia and the United States began Saturday in the town of Vale do Paraiso, Angola's northern Bengo province.

item.title: Mexico City mayor declines presidential run to focus on rebuilding effort
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Mexico City mayor, Miguel Angel Mancera, on Saturday refused to abandon his position to lead the presidential campaign of a new coalition of parties ahead of the 2018 elections.

item.title: Mexico City mayor declines presidential run to focus on rebuilding effort
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Mexico City mayor, Miguel Angel Mancera, on Saturday refused to abandon his position to lead the presidential campaign of a new coalition of parties ahead of the 2018 elections.

item.title: First snowfall this season comes to New York
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first snowfall of the season arrived in New York on Saturday morning, and is expected to continue until early Sunday morning.

item.title: First snowfall this season comes to New York
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first snowfall of the season arrived in New York on Saturday morning, and is expected to continue until early Sunday morning.

item.title: First snowfall this season comes to New York
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: The first snowfall of the season arrived in New York on Saturday morning, and is expected to continue until early Sunday morning.

item.title: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece attend joint press conference
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece agreed on Saturday that the whole region needs to be included in the European Union (EU) and that the cooperation on joint projects can bring the region long-awaited prosperity and stability.

item.title: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece attend joint press conference
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece agreed on Saturday that the whole region needs to be included in the European Union (EU) and that the cooperation on joint projects can bring the region long-awaited prosperity and stability.

item.title: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece attend joint press conference
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Leaders of Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania and Greece agreed on Saturday that the whole region needs to be included in the European Union (EU) and that the cooperation on joint projects can bring the region long-awaited prosperity and stability.

item.title: Udhauli festival marking migration of animals and birds celebrated in Nepal
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Udhauli is the annual festival celebrated by Kirat community of eastern Nepal marking the migration of animals and birds to low altitude towards warmer regions as the winter coming.

item.title: Udhauli festival marking migration of animals and birds celebrated in Nepal
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Udhauli is the annual festival celebrated by Kirat community of eastern Nepal marking the migration of animals and birds to low altitude towards warmer regions as the winter coming.

item.title: Udhauli festival marking migration of animals and birds celebrated in Nepal
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Udhauli is the annual festival celebrated by Kirat community of eastern Nepal marking the migration of animals and birds to low altitude towards warmer regions as the winter coming.

item.title: In pics: Archaeological discovery in heritage-rich Luxor of Egypt
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Egyptian Minister of Antiquities Khalid El-Anany announced Saturday the discovery of a new tomb and the re-discovery of an older one in the heritage-rich Luxor province in Upper Egypt.

item.title: In pics: Archaeological discovery in heritage-rich Luxor of Egypt
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Egyptian Minister of Antiquities Khalid El-Anany announced Saturday the discovery of a new tomb and the re-discovery of an older one in the heritage-rich Luxor province in Upper Egypt.

item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Egyptian Minister of Antiquities Khalid El-Anany announced Saturday the discovery of a new tomb and the re-discovery of an older one in the heritage-rich Luxor province in Upper Egypt.

item.title: In pics: Archaeological discovery in heritage-rich Luxor of Egypt
item.author: 中国日报-国际
item.description: Egyptian Minister of Antiquities Khalid El-Anany announced Saturday the discovery of a new tomb and the re-discovery of an older one in the heritage-rich Luxor province in Upper Egypt.
